title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Kolte-Patil Developers - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Kolte-Patil Developers - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Kolte-Patil Developers has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Varanasi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Kolte-Patil Developers:
Kolte-Patil Developers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
